positive: A vibrant, stylized depiction of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting gracefully among glowing, stylized wildflowers and ancient Japanese cherry blossoms. The fox should have a sleek, ethereal silhouette with nine visible tails, rendered in rich jewel tones (sapphire, amethyst, jade). The composition should be centered, featuring deep indigo and twilight blue backgrounds contrasted sharply with warm gold and magenta floral accents. Use a clean, graphic aesthetic with strong linework, reminiscent of modern woodcut prints or Japanese Ukiyo-e, but adapted for a high-contrast apparel print. Dynamic use of negative space to enhance the subject's silhouette. Lighting should be dramatic and volumetric, suggesting a magical glow emanating from the blossoms and the fox itself. High detail, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, text, signature, watermark, logo, low detail, messy, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, noise, cartoon, photorealistic, ugly
